lead: We are structurally not in your AI inference path.
No token markup. No surprise inference bill. The AI runs on your existing Claude or Cursor subscription — we never see the call.
Works the day our servers go down. The generation just happened on your machine, through your AI client. Your keys, your model, your call.
Build apps visually. Bring your own AI. The model you're already paying for does the work — no proxied prompts, no second token bill.
A visual builder that works without AI. Add AI when you're ready — through the AI client you already use.
